title: podocarpus rumphii
intro: Podocarpus rumphii, also known as the male cone of the podocarpus tree, is a plant native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia and Malaysia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Podocarpus rumphii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and act as an antiviral agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or a tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever and cough.
